AI Hiring Maturity Audit

Find out where your hiring sits on the AI maturity curve

Most talent teams can't say whether they're ahead or behind. This 4-minute audit gives you a maturity score, a benchmark against teams in your region and industry, and the three moves that close your biggest gap.

Start the audit → 4 minutes. No prep. Your score on screen.
Why it matters

The teams pulling ahead aren't working harder. They've changed how they screen.

The gap between the teams who've put AI into screening and everyone else isn't talent or budget — it's process. Teams stuck screening by hand spend their week on first-round calls that mostly go nowhere. The ones who fixed it moved those hours to closing.

The maturity curve

The five levels of hiring maturity

Every talent team sits on one of these rungs. Most think they're a level higher than they are.

1
Manual. Every CV read by hand. Screening is a calendar problem.
2
Assisted. Some filters and templates, but humans still do the heavy lifting.
3
Automated. First-round screening runs without a recruiter in the room.
4
Intelligent. Screening adapts to the role and surfaces the right people, ranked.
5
Autonomous. The funnel runs itself; your team only meets people worth meeting.
The audit

The audit

Ten questions across five dimensions. Answer honestly — the benchmark only helps if your inputs are real.

  • Screening speed and volume
  • Structure and consistency
  • AI adoption today
  • Candidate experience
  • Data and bias controls

Want to close the gap?

The report shows you what to fix. A 20-minute call shows you how — mapped to your roles, your volume, your stack. No pitch deck, just your funnel and where the time is leaking.
